subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Your letter was received and, as fate would have it, Monsieur Dreyfus and the handmaid of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق نامه شما رسید و از قضای اتفاق جناب مسیو دریفوس و امه الله
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @non-participation in politics, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @personal instructions, @education of children; moral education, @constitutional revolution in Iran
